title: The Tomb of the Sunken King
main_character: Kaelen, an agile and resourceful tomb raider.
lore_and_rules: The Tomb is cursed. Magic items glow when near danger. Kaelen is mortal and must rely on stealth and tools rather than brute strength.

plot_outline.title: The Overgrown Gates
plot_outline.setting: The humid, vine-choked ruins outside the Tomb. Twilight.

objectives.goal: Find the 'Moonstone Key' hidden in the outer ruins
objectives.obstacles: A territorial shadow-panther prowls the ruins. Pit traps are hidden under the leaves.

objectives.goal: Use the 'Moonstone Key' to unlock the heavy stone doors to enter the Tomb.
objectives.obstacles: The door mechanism is heavily rusted.

plot_outline.title: The Hall of Whispers
plot_outline.setting: Inside the Tomb. A dark, echoing stone corridor. The floor is covered in crunchy bone debris.

objectives.goal: Sneak past the blind Spectral Guardian
objectives.obstacles: The Spectral Guardian is blind but has incredible hearing.

objectives.goal: Retrieve the 'Sun Shield' from the central pedestal
objectives.obstacles: Stepping on the bone debris makes loud noises.

plot_outline.title: The Flooded Throne
plot_outline.setting: The flooded throne room of the Sunken King. Water is waist-deep.

objectives.goal: Use the Sun Shield to deflect the King's magic
objectives.obstacles: The Sunken King awakens and casts necrotic spells.

objectives.goal: Steal the 'Golden Crown' from the King's skeletal head

objectives.obstacles: The exit stairs begin to collapse during the escape.

author: dobrado76
